name: Hotel Management Software (Cloud PMS)
tagline: Run your hotel from anywhere, anytime
shortDescription: A cloud-based hotel property management system that runs your front desk, reservations, billing, housekeeping and revenue from any device. Manage a single property or a full chain, cut manual work, and keep every department in sync in real time.
description:
Our cloud Hotel PMS brings every part of property management under one login — reservations, front office, billing, housekeeping, rate and revenue management, and guest engagement. Because it is cloud-based, there is no hardware to maintain and your team can work securely from any internet-connected device.

From speedy check-in and automatic night audit to multi-currency folios, group bookings and chain consolidation, the system is built to boost efficiency, profit and guest satisfaction for properties of every size.
highlights: Manage front desk, reservations and billing from any device
Real-time revenue metrics — occupancy, ADR and RevPAR
Single login for hotel chains and groups

keyFeatures.title: Front Office
keyFeatures.description: Speedy check-in/check-out, automatic night audit, automatic room allocation, colour-coded room status and guest ID capture.

keyFeatures.title: Reservations
keyFeatures.description: Handle walk-in, online, OTA, travel-agent and corporate bookings with instant confirmation and group booking support.

keyFeatures.title: Billing & Payments
keyFeatures.description: Split and merge folios, transfer charges between rooms, and generate invoices in the guest's preferred currency and language.

keyFeatures.title: Rate & Revenue Management
keyFeatures.description: Season-based rate plans, source-wise contracts, and live tracking of occupancy, ADR and RevPAR from one screen.

keyFeatures.title: Housekeeping
keyFeatures.description: Assign and update tasks from a mobile app, block or unblock rooms, and keep the front desk in sync.

keyFeatures.title: Hotel Chains
keyFeatures.description: Consolidate group data through a central reservation system with shared guest profiles and role-based access.

specifications.label: Property types
specifications.value: Hotels, resorts, hostels, serviced apartments, chains

specifications.label: Security
specifications.value: Role-based access, transaction locking, audit logs

faqs.q: Can I manage more than one property?
faqs.a: Yes. The cloud PMS supports hotel chains and groups through a central reservation system with shared guest profiles and role-based access for each location.

faqs.q: Does it work without installing software?
faqs.a: Yes. It is fully cloud-based — you only need an internet connection and a browser or the mobile app. There is no server or hardware to maintain.

faqs.q: Can it connect to OTAs and our website?
faqs.a: Yes. It integrates with a channel manager for OTA distribution and an online booking engine for commission-free direct bookings from your website.

name: Hotel Management Software (Desktop PMS)
tagline: A fast, reliable PMS that works offline
shortDescription: An on-premise hotel property management system that runs fully offline — from reservation to check-out, billing, housekeeping and night audit. Ideal for properties that want their data on-site and uninterrupted operation regardless of internet.
description:
Our desktop Hotel PMS is a powerful on-premise property management system that keeps running even when the internet does not. It covers the complete guest journey — reservations, check-in, billing, housekeeping, maintenance and night audit — in one fast, foolproof interface.

With an integrated booking engine and two-way channel manager, multi-currency support and a mobile reporting companion, it suits hotels, resorts, hostels and multi-property operators that prefer their data on-site.
highlights: Data stays on your own premises
Built-in booking engine and channel manager

keyFeatures.title: Multi-view Reservation Centre
keyFeatures.description: Room view, tape chart, list and summary views with real-time availability at a glance.

keyFeatures.title: Check-in to Check-out
keyFeatures.description: Key-card support, blacklist alerts, split billing, late fees, folio transfer and gate pass.

keyFeatures.title: Housekeeping & Maintenance
keyFeatures.description: Drag-and-drop task assignment plus equipment and spares tracking.

keyFeatures.title: Night Audit
keyFeatures.description: Automated end-of-day audit with the reports your managers need.

keyFeatures.title: Distribution
keyFeatures.description: Integrated booking engine and two-way channel manager covering OTAs and global distribution systems.

keyFeatures.title: Mobile Reporting
keyFeatures.description: Check live performance from a companion mobile reporting app.

specifications.label: Taxes
specifications.value: Configurable, up to multiple tax slabs

specifications.label: Integrations
specifications.value: Booking engine, channel manager, restaurant POS

faqs.q: Does it keep working if the internet goes down?
faqs.a: Yes. It is an on-premise desktop system designed to operate fully offline, so your front desk never stops.

faqs.q: Where is our data stored?
faqs.a: On your own premises, giving you direct control over your property data.

faqs.q: Can it still connect to OTAs?
faqs.a: Yes. It includes a two-way channel manager and booking engine to manage OTA and direct bookings.

name: Hotel Channel Manager
tagline: Distribute every room across every channel, in real time
shortDescription: A cloud hotel channel manager that updates rates and inventory across 130+ OTAs, GDS and vacation-rental portals in real time. Maintain rate parity, minimise overbookings and maximise revenue with built-in yield management — all from one dashboard.
description:
Our hotel channel manager gives you centralised, real-time control over your online distribution. Update rates and availability across 130+ global and regional channels from a single dashboard, and let the system push every change instantly so you never sell a room twice.

With rate parity, master and derived rate plans, yield-based pricing and competitor rate analysis, it helps you reach new markets and lift occupancy, ADR and RevPAR.
highlights: Connect to 130+ OTAs, GDS and rental portals
Real-time rate parity and minimal overbooking

keyFeatures.title: Real-time Distribution
keyFeatures.description: Single-click rate and inventory updates pushed instantly to every connected channel.

keyFeatures.title: Rate Parity
keyFeatures.description: Maintain identical rates across all channels to protect your brand and rankings.

keyFeatures.title: Yield Management
keyFeatures.description: Automatically derive the best available rate from occupancy to lift ADR and RevPAR.

keyFeatures.title: Master & Derived Rates
keyFeatures.description: Change a master rate plan and have every derived plan update automatically.

keyFeatures.title: Competitor Rate Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Monitor competitor pricing across channels to price with confidence.

keyFeatures.title: Mobile & PMS Sync
keyFeatures.description: Two-way PMS connection plus a mobile app to manage rates on the go.

faqs.q: How many channels can I connect?
faqs.a: The channel manager connects to 130+ global and regional OTAs, GDS and vacation-rental portals, with new channels added regularly.

faqs.q: Will it stop overbookings?
faqs.a: Yes. Inventory updates in real time across every channel, which minimises the risk of selling the same room twice.

faqs.q: Does it keep rates consistent?
faqs.a: Yes. Rate parity keeps your room rates identical across all connected channels.

name: Hotel Booking Engine
tagline: Endless commission-free direct bookings
shortDescription: A responsive hotel booking engine that drives commission-free direct bookings straight from your website and social pages. A fast two-step flow, plug-and-play widgets, multi-currency support and many payment gateways help you convert lookers into bookers, 24/7.
description:
Our booking engine turns your own website into your best-performing, commission-free sales channel. A responsive two-step booking flow, plug-and-play widgets and an interactive chatbot make it effortless for guests to book directly with you.

With packages and deals, review management, multi-currency and multi-language support and dozens of payment gateways, it increases direct revenue while improving the guest experience — for single hotels and chains alike.

keyFeatures.title: Responsive Booking
keyFeatures.description: A mobile-optimised, two-step flow with plug-and-play widgets and an interactive chatbot to boost conversion.

keyFeatures.title: Group & Chain Bookings
keyFeatures.description: Run direct bookings for all chain locations through a single login with consolidated reporting.

keyFeatures.title: Packages & Deals
keyFeatures.description: Create promotions, corporate rates and last-minute or advance-purchase deals.

keyFeatures.title: Review Management
keyFeatures.description: Collect and showcase guest reviews and monitor your reputation.

keyFeatures.title: Multi-currency & Language
keyFeatures.description: Show rates and accept payments in the guest's own currency and language.

keyFeatures.title: Guest Engagement
keyFeatures.description: Automated pre-arrival, in-house and post-departure emails.

faqs.q: Do you charge commission per booking?
faqs.a: No. Bookings made through your own website with the booking engine are commission-free.

faqs.q: Can guests pay online?
faqs.a: Yes. The booking engine supports a wide range of payment gateways with PCI-DSS secure processing.

faqs.q: Does it work for hotel chains?
faqs.a: Yes. A single login can run direct bookings for every property in a chain with consolidated reporting.

name: Hotel Revenue Management
tagline: Dynamic pricing that maximises revenue, 365 days a year
shortDescription: A revenue management and dynamic pricing system that sets the right room rate every day using an intelligent pricing engine, demand analysis, real-time inventory sync and competitor rates. It lifts occupancy and RevPAR while saving hours of manual rate work.
description:
Our revenue management system applies demand-based dynamic pricing across all your inventory, every day of the year. An intelligent pricing engine analyses historical and live data, occupancy, seasonality, lead time and competitor rates to recommend the optimal price.

Available as self-service software or a fully managed service, it helps properties grow revenue and RevPAR while freeing your team from manual rate updates.
highlights: Dynamic pricing applied 365 days a year

keyFeatures.title: Intelligent Pricing Engine
keyFeatures.description: Recommends optimal rates from demand, occupancy, seasonality and lead time.

keyFeatures.title: Business Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Combines historical and present performance to guide pricing decisions.

keyFeatures.title: Real-time Inventory Sync
keyFeatures.description: Keeps pricing aligned with live availability across your systems.

keyFeatures.title: Competitor Rate Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Tracks compset rates so you price competitively.

keyFeatures.title: Multilevel Property Assessment
keyFeatures.description: Assesses performance across room types and segments.

keyFeatures.title: Insightful Reports
keyFeatures.description: Admin dashboard, rules analysis and pick-up reports at a glance.

specifications.label: Inputs
specifications.value: Occupancy, seasonality, lead time, competitor rates

audience: Hotels and resorts without in-house revenue teams

faqs.q: Do I need a revenue manager to use it?
faqs.a: No. You can run it as self-service software or choose a fully managed service where pricing is handled for you.

faqs.q: What does it base prices on?
faqs.a: It uses occupancy, seasonality, lead time, demand and competitor rates, combined with your historical performance.

faqs.q: Will it work with my existing systems?
faqs.a: Yes. It synchronises inventory in real time and works alongside your PMS, channel manager and booking engine.

name: Hotel & Restaurant Website Builder
tagline: A booking-ready website for your property
shortDescription: A website builder made for hotels and restaurants — elegant templates, free hosting and SSL, multi-language and SEO support, drag-and-drop editing and a dedicated designer. Integrates with the booking engine so your site turns visitors into direct bookings.
description:
Our website builder helps hotels and restaurants present their brand beautifully and convert visitors into direct bookings. Choose from ready-made templates and themes, edit with drag-and-drop, and launch with free hosting and SSL — supported by a dedicated website designer.

With multi-language, SEO-friendly pages, conversion widgets and built-in booking-engine integration, your website becomes a true sales channel.
highlights: Integrated booking engine for direct bookings

keyFeatures.title: Templates & Themes
keyFeatures.description: A range of ready-made, customisable templates and theme options.

keyFeatures.title: Drag-and-Drop Editing
keyFeatures.description: Make changes yourself with no coding or HTML knowledge.

keyFeatures.title: Free Hosting & SSL
keyFeatures.description: Hosting and an SSL certificate are included.

keyFeatures.title: Multi-language & SEO
keyFeatures.description: Reach a wider audience with translation support and SEO-ready pages.

keyFeatures.title: Conversion Widgets
keyFeatures.description: Looker-to-booker widgets and booking-engine integration drive direct bookings.

keyFeatures.title: Dedicated Designer
keyFeatures.description: A dedicated website designer helps bring your brand to life.

faqs.q: Can I edit the website myself?
faqs.a: Yes. Drag-and-drop editing lets you make changes without any coding, and older versions are backed up automatically.

faqs.q: Is hosting included?
faqs.a: Yes. Free hosting and an SSL certificate are included.

faqs.q: Will it take direct bookings?
faqs.a: Yes. It integrates with the booking engine so your website converts visitors into commission-free direct bookings.

name: Restaurant Management & POS (Cloud)
tagline: Run your restaurant from anywhere
shortDescription: A cloud restaurant POS that needs only a browser and internet to run your F&B business. Handle dine-in, takeaway, delivery and room-service orders, plus tables, menus, billing, inventory and multi-outlet control — with a tablet ordering app.
description:
Our cloud restaurant POS lets you run and monitor your F&B business from anywhere, with instant updates and zero downtime. Manage orders across dine-in, takeaway, delivery and room service, and control tables, menus, billing, inventory and shifts from one system.

A tablet-based ordering app works with or without internet, online-ordering platforms sync automatically, and multi-outlet tools keep chains consolidated.
highlights: Manage your restaurant from any device
Tablet ordering app for fast table-side orders

keyFeatures.title: Order Management
keyFeatures.description: Dine-in, takeaway, delivery and room-service orders captured in full detail.

keyFeatures.title: Table & Menu Management
keyFeatures.description: Assign servers, transfer orders and run season or happy-hour menus.

keyFeatures.title: Online Ordering & Delivery
keyFeatures.description: Sync online-ordering platforms and assign and track delivery drivers.

keyFeatures.title: Inventory & Stock
keyFeatures.description: Real-time stock control with recipes and threshold alerts to cut wastage.

keyFeatures.title: Billing & Payments
keyFeatures.description: Split bills, manage discounts and offers, and accept multiple payment modes.

keyFeatures.title: Multi-outlet & Reports
keyFeatures.description: Manage many outlets from one place with consolidated, customisable reports.

keyFeatures.title: 3rd-Party Food Aggregators
keyFeatures.description: Connect to popular online food-ordering and delivery aggregator apps so external orders flow straight into the POS — no separate tablets to juggle.

keyFeatures.title: 3rd-Party Financial Software
keyFeatures.description: Integrate with leading financial and accounting software so sales, taxes and day-close figures post automatically to your books.

keyFeatures.title: Kitchen Display System (KDS)
keyFeatures.description: Send orders directly to kitchen screens — no paper tickets, clearer preparation queues and faster table turnaround.

faqs.q: Does the ordering app work without internet?
faqs.a: Yes. The tablet-based ordering app works with or without an internet connection and syncs when back online.

faqs.q: Can it connect to online-ordering apps?
faqs.a: Yes. Online-ordering platforms sync into the POS so all orders are managed in one place.

faqs.q: Can I manage several outlets?
faqs.a: Yes. You can create and manage multiple outlets from one place with consolidated chain reporting.

description:
Our desktop restaurant POS is built for uninterrupted service. It runs on-premise and offline, so your floor keeps moving regardless of the internet, and covers orders, tables, menus, shifts, billing and inventory in one reliable system.

Real-time stock control, third-party interfaces and a mobile reporting app help you stay productive across fine dining, fast food, cafes, clubs and bars.

keyFeatures.title: Billing & Payments

It suits a wide range of stores, from supermarkets and pharmacies to fashion, electronics and departmental outlets, and acts as the central hub for any on-premise terminals.

Our desktop retail POS is a unified billing and management system for independent retailers and distributors. It runs on laptops, tablets and handheld devices, in real-time or fully offline, so sales never stop.

With built-in financial accounting, payment processing and CRM, and a sync mode that connects branches to the cloud, it scales from a single store to a distributed chain across many retail verticals.

tagline: Streamline, automate and grow your salon

Built-in CRM, loyalty, gift cards and automated WhatsApp, SMS and email campaigns help you fill the calendar and keep clients coming back — for independent salons and multi-location chains alike.

faqs.a: Yes. It supports multi-location businesses from independent salons to high-end chains.

tagline: Manage your people from hire to retire

tagline: Accurate attendance, straight to payroll

With multi-location support and access-control options, it removes manual timesheets, reduces payroll errors and gives managers a live view of who is in, late or absent.

name: POS Printers (Thermal & Dot-Matrix)
tagline: Fast, reliable receipt and kitchen printing
shortDescription: Thermal and dot-matrix POS printers for receipts, kitchen orders and invoices — fast, quiet and dependable, with options for every retail and hospitality counter.
description: Choose from thermal printers for crisp, quiet receipts and dot-matrix printers for multi-part and kitchen printing. Our POS printers are built for high-volume use and integrate cleanly with our billing and restaurant systems.

name: Barcode Scanners
tagline: Quick, accurate scanning at every counter
shortDescription: Handheld and fixed barcode scanners for fast, accurate checkout and stock-taking — 1D and 2D options for retail, pharmacy, warehouse and hospitality use.
description: Our barcode scanners speed up checkout and inventory with reliable 1D and 2D reading. Choose handheld, hands-free or fixed models to suit your counter, stockroom or warehouse, all compatible with our POS and inventory software.

shortDescription: Desktop and industrial barcode and label printers for product labelling, shelf tags and logistics — durable, high-resolution and ready for retail, pharmacy and warehouse use.

name: Biometric & Access Control Devices
tagline: Secure attendance and access control
shortDescription: Fingerprint and biometric devices for time & attendance and door access control — accurate, fast and ready to sync with HR and payroll for reliable workforce tracking.
description: Our biometric fingerprint and access-control devices capture attendance accurately and secure your premises. They pair with our time & attendance and HR software so employee hours flow straight to payroll, with door-access control where needed.
